title: Skelly's Titanium Mod
description: Skelly's Titanium Mod is a mod that adds titanium to Minecraft!
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf5a3034622c1e3d9ada894c8a8e02033424a7b3.png)
## **Skelly's Titanium Mod is a mod that adds titanium to Minecraft!**

**Titanium is obtainable at Y=52 and deeper.**


**Titanium tools last longer than netherite! (Trust me, its worth trying to get titanium!)**
## How To Obtain:

**You might be asking yourself, "how do I get titanium?" Well for starters, Titanium ore can only be mined with dimond tools or higher. Once you have the proper tools, you need to mine to atlest Y=52 or deeper. Titanium should look like this:**
![Mining Titanium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54ac8e767756398d1a634a11a1fbba1967c97ed8.png)
**Mining the ore will give you titanium shreds. You can smelt it to get Melted Titanium.**
![Smelting Titanium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adfda5072f3960e12124a12662a1ba0a44da16f1_0.webp)
**Once smelted, you can put two melted titanium together to make a titanium ingot.**
![Crafting Titanium Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e75ba9faa25e96f6322b9400d37eae240f38eb6_0.webp)
**After that, you can create titanium tools and armor!**
![Crafting Titanium Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79af8dbfdf2ec1870a729bbd720344009fdcdfc8_0.webp)

## Adds:
**-Titanium Ore, Titanium Shreds, Melted Titanium, and Titanium Ingots**

**-Titanium Tools**

**-Titanium Armor**

## Issues:
**-For some reason Titanium Ore is really rare and mostly generates near lava. This is actively trying to be fixed. (I have the ore set to be more common than dimands. Idk why it's really rare.)**


##
